raw_text: ABBOTT, B., O.B.E. (1957).—b. 1913; ed. King Edward's Sch. and Tynemouth High Sch.; mil. serv., 1939-46, lt.-col.; cadet, Nig., 1946; admin. offr., cl. II, W. Nig., 1954; sec. to comsn. on the public service, Nig., 1954-55; admin. offr., cl. I, 1957-62; temp. prin. D.T.C., 1962; O.D.M., 1964.
ABBOTT, F.—b. 1916; ed. R.C. Convent, Littlehampton, and Angmering Olders Sch.; mil. serv., 1939-46; inspr. wks, P.W.D., Nig., 1950; W. Nig., 1954; senr. tech. offr., 1959. (W. Nig. Govt. service.)

ABBOTT, L.—b. 1921; ed. Kings Coll. Sch., Wimbledon; mil. serv., 1941-46, st. sgt. maj.; clerical offr., C.O., 1938; exec. offr., 1948; higher exec. offr., 1950; senr. exec. offr., 1958; ch. exec. offr., 1963; dep. estab. offr., 1964.

ABBOTT, L. N. A.—b. 1913; ed. Woodland Rd. Sch. and Beaufoy Tech. Inst., Lond.; Br. P.O. 1931-39; mil. serv., 1939-47; techn. gr. I, E.A.P. & T. admin., 1953; asst. engnr., gr. II, 1955; gr. I, 1956; senr. asst. engnr., 1962.

ABBOTT, Sir Myles, Kt.(1964).—b. 1906; ed. King's Sch., Canterbury; barrister, Gray's Inn; mil. serv., 1941-45, lieut.; asst. crown solr., H.K., 1936; secon. to Ethiopian Govt. as pres., high ct., 1946; puisne judge, Nig., 1950; judge, high ct. of Lagos and Cams., 1955; fedl. justice, 1957; ch. just., Berm., 1961.

ABBOTT, S. H.—b. 1908; ed. Antigua Gram. Sch.; appt. agric. dept., Antigua, 1929; agric. asst., St. Kitts, 1939; farm manager, 1944; agric. offr., Virgin Is., 1946; Nevis, 1949; agric. supt., Antigua, 1955; St. Kitts, 1957.
ABDULLAH, H.—b. 1927; med. offr., H.K., 1954.

ABELL, Sir Anthony, K.C.M.G. (1952), C.M.G.—b. 1906; ed. Repton and Magdalen Coll., Oxford; cadet, Nig., 1929; admin. offr. cl. II, 1946; cl. I, 1948; gov. and c.-in-c., Sarawak, 1950-59; regl. offr. o'seas servs. resettlement bureau, 1961-64.
ABRAHAM, R. H.—b. 1928; ed. Royal Coll., Maur., and Woolwich Poly., Lond.; o'seer, gr. II, Maur., 1950; inspr., gr. I, 1955; exec. engrn., 1959.
ADAMS, C. W.—b. 1920; ed. Public Schs., and Melbourne Tech. Coll.; mil. serv., 1940-46; wireless offr., G. & E.I.C., 1949; chief wireless offr., 1953; compt., posts and telecoms., 1963.
ADAMS, G. W.—b. 1924; ed. Broughton Sec. Sch., Edin.; mil. serv. 1943-46; Br. P.O., 1941-56; E.A.P. & T. admin., serv. and sales supt., 1956; asst. tele. contr., 1958; senr. asst. 1961.
ADAMS, H. L., C.M.G. (1961), T.D.—b. 1910; ed. Haileybury; mil. serv., 1939-45, lt.-col.; cadet, Ken., 1946; sec., comrce. and industry, 1949; econ. sec., E.A.C.S.O., 1954; chief admin. sec., 1959.

ADAMS, J. E. M.—b. 1923; ed. Modern High Sch., B. Guiana; clk., P.O., B. Guiana, 1943; asst. inspr., labr., 1949; inspr., labr., 1953; labr. comsnr., B. Hond., 1957; dep. comsnr., labr., B. Guiana, 1960.

ADAMS, J. McP.—b. 1918; ed. Cranbrook Sch., Sydney, St. Peter's Coll., Adelaide, Gonville and Caius Coll., Camb.; barrister-at-law, Inner Temple; aj/asst. div. food offr., M.O.F., Camb.; high ct. prosecr. and mil. govt. prosecr., Control Commsn., Germany; cr. couns., Nig., 1951; Sar., 1956; secon. dep. legal advr. Brunei, 1957–59; legal dfstmn., E. Nig., 1960; Swaz., 1961.
ADAMS, M. J.—b. 1918; cadet Nig., 1947; admin. offr., 1950; dist. offr. N. Rhod., 1950; secon. office of cmsgnr. for N. Rhod., 1959; senr. D.O. gr. II., 1961; gr. I., 1962. (Zambia Govt. service.)

ADAMS, M. W.—b. 1929; ed. Ranelagh Gram. Sch., and City Lond. Coll.; mil. serv., 1947–49, R.A.F., rad. mech.; acctnt. Nig. Coll. Arts, Sc. and Techn., 1952; audtr. Ken., 1957; senr. audtr. G. & E.I.C., 1960.
ADAMS, R. K.—b. 1911; asst. regisr., co-op. socs., S.L., 1939; Nig., 1946; S.L., 1950; co-op. dev. expert, Gam., 1961; Aden, 1963.
ADAMSON, A. R.—b. 1916; ed. Queen's Royal Coll., Trin., and Portsmouth Municipal Coll.; exec. engnr., Trin., 1947; asst. D.P.W., B. Guiana, 1958; chief engnr. (roads), 1958.
ADAMSON, J. C. M.—b. 1910; ed. Indiville Coll., Edinburgh; temp. storekpr., S.L., 1944; stock verifier, 1949; storekpr. gr. I., 1953; ch. storekpr., 1961. (S.L. Govt. service.)
ADAMSON, P. V. C.—b. 1928; ed. Devonport High Sch., Plymouth Tech. Coll., and Univ. Coll., Exeter; educ. offr., Sarawak, secon. Brunei, 1954; trans. Brunei, 1959.

ADDI, M.—b. 1917; ed. Bishop Gobat Sch., Jerusalem; posts and tels. depts., Pal., 1936–48; Pal. accts. clearance office, Cyp., 1948–49; C.O., 1949–50; asst. postmaster, Nyasa., 1950; asst. acctnt., 1952; acctnt., 1955; secon., Fed. of Rhod. and Nyasa., 1954–56; acctnt., posts and tels., dept., N. Borneo, 1957; sen. postal acctnt., P.O., H.K., 1959; ch. postal acctnt., 1962.

ADIE, J. J., C.M.G. (1962), Brill. Star of Zanz. (4th cl. 1947)—b. 1913; ed. Kingsland Grange Prep. Sch., Shrewsbury Sch. and Magdalen Coll., Oxford; mil. serv., 1940–42 (K.A.R. and O.E.T.A.); admin. offr., Zanz., 1937; asst. dist. comsnr., Pemba, 1938; Zanz., 1939; p.s. to Br. Res., 1939–40; asst. sec., 1942; senr. asst. sec. and p.s. to H.H. the Sultan, 1946; secon. C.O., 1949; sec., educ., labr. and lands, Ken., 1952; chief sec., Barb., 1957; perm. sec., Ken., 1958–63; temp. prin., D.T.C., 1964; O.D.M., 1964.
ADLARD, P. G.—b. 1926; ed. St. Edward's Sch., Oxford and Exeter Coll., Oxford; mil. serv., 1945–47, R.N.; asst. consvr. (forests), Nyas., 1953; silviculturist, 1961. (Malawi Govt. service.)

ADSHEAD, J. W., M.B.E. (1965).—b. 1923; ed. Tettenhall Coll., Staffs., Blundell's Sch., and Birmingham Univ.; mil. serv., 1942–47; senr. auditor, N. Nig., 1958; prin. auditor, Gam., 1960; redesig. dir. audit, 1963.
AERS, I. B.—b. 1921; ed. Dulwich Coll., and Sandhurst; mil. serv., 1939–48, major (desps.) cadet Tang., 1948; dist. offr., 1950; Swaz., 1963.

AGG, A. D.—b. 1912; ed. S.A. Collegiate Sch., Cape Town; mil. serv., 1939–40, 2nd lieut.; archt. asst., P.W.D., N. Rhod., 1938; asst. archt., 1945; archt., 1949; senr. archt., 1951; asst. D.P.W. (buildings), Nyasa., 1955; ret. re-appt. sen. archt., E. Nig., 1959; ch. archt., 1961. (Nig. Govt. service.)

AGOSTINI, C.—b. 1914; ed. St. Mary's Coll., Trin.; control offr., Trin., 1941; dep. aerodrome supt., 1946; dir. of civil aviation, and aerodrome supt., 1947; loaned to I.C.A.O., civ. aviation, Dominican Republic, 1956–57. (T'dad. Govt. service.)
AHMED, A. A., M.B.E. (1963).—b. 1917; ed. Sec. Sch., Aden and Kingston Tech. Coll., Lond.; clk., sec't, Aden, 1942; asst. income tax offr., 1952; asst. sec., 1956; clk. leg. co., 1960.
AHMED, M. H. C.—b. 1913; prob. labr. inspr., Maur., 1938; labr. inspr., 1940; labr. field offr., 1946; asst. labr. comsnr., 1950; redesig. sen. labr. offr.; prin. labr. offr., 1964.
AIKEN, D. F.—b. 1927; ed. Stanley Tech. Sch., S. Norwood, Lond.; mil. serv., 1944–47, Parachute Regt., pte.; dental mech., Uga., 1952; senr. dental techn. (i/c trng.), 1961–64. (Uga. Govt. service.)

AINLEY, Sir John, Kt. (1957), M.C.—b. 1906; ed. St. Bees Sch. and Corpus Christi Coll., Oxford; barrister-at-law, Gray's Inn; mil. serv., 1939–45, maj.; dist. mag., G.C., 1935; cr. coun., 1936; puisne judge, Uga., 1946; ch. just., E. Nig., 1953; Swak., N. Borneo and Brunei, 1959; Ken., 1962. (Ken. Govt. service.)
AINLEY, J. M.—b. 1925; ed. Huddersfield Coll. Sch., Bridlington Gram. Sch. and Yorks. Inst. of Agric.; field offr., agric., Tang., 1949; agric. offr., 1958. (Tanzania Govt. service.)

ITCHISON, G. L.—b. 1920; ed. Cathedral Boys Sch., Shanghai, St. Albans Sch., and Selwyn Coll., Camb.; mil. serv., 1941–46, major; admin. cadet, Nig., 1947; district offr., 1952; senr. district offr., 1962; under sec. (estabs.), 1964. (Nig. Govt. service.)

AITKEN, I. H., C.B.E. (1964).—b. 1919; ed. Greenock High Sch. and St. Andrews Univ.; tax assessor, Ken., 1944; senr. immig. offr., 1948; dep. prin. immig. offr., 1952; prin. immig. offr., 1960–64. (Ken. Govt. service.)

AITKEN, Maj. R., O.B.E. (1963).—b. 1910; ed. Gregg Comm. Coll., Ipswich; mil. serv., 1939–46, major; H.M. prison service, 1936; secon. supt., prisons, B. Hond., 1946; resig.; N.Z. prisons serv., 1947; re-appointed supt., prisons, B. Hond., 1949; dep. dir. of prisons, J'ca, 1951; dir., prisons, B. Guiana, 1955–64.

AKEROYD, A.—b. 1911; ed. St. Luke's Sch. and Cockburn High Sch., Leeds; asst. civ. engr., Admrtv., 1943; civ. engr. 1945; archt. N. Rhod., 1947; senr. archt., 1955; dep. dir. wks. 1961. (Zambia Govt. service.)
AKERS-JONES, D.—b. 1927; ed. Worthing High Sch. and Brasenose Coll., Oxford; Merchant Navy, 1944-45, third offr.; appt. M.C.S., 1953; admin. offr., H.K., 1957; senr. admin. offr., 1962.
ALBAN, R. G. W. E.—b. 1899; ed. Berkhamsted Sch.; mil. serv., 1918-1927; lt.-col.; Indian political serv., 1927-1947; comsnr., Kamaran I., Aden, 1952.
ALBURY, F. C. W.—b. 1904; ed. privately; wireless operator, Bah., 1918; sec., bd. of agric., 1924; senr. agric. offr., 1954; dep. dir., agric., 1957.
ALBURY, K. H. E.—b. 1920; ed. Govt. High Sch., Nassau; clk., public treasy., Bah., 1940; asst. audr., 1950; audr., 1956.

ALCANTARA, J. E.—b. 1926; ed. Christian Bros. Coll., Gib., Univ. Coll., Lond.; Linc. Inn, 1946; mem. city coun., 1954-56; mem. leg. coun. 1954-57; regsr. sup. ct., 1957; judge ct. of first inst. and stip. mag., 1963.
ALCINDOR, E. G., C.P.M. (1953).—b. 1913; asst. supt. police, Trin., 1951; supt., 1958; senr. supt., 1963. (Trin. Govt. service.)

ALDEN, J. W., M.B.E. (1945).—b. 1916; ed. Sloane Sch., Chelsea; mil. serv., 1939-46; rev. clk., Ken., 1946; rev. offr., 1947; tax offr., E.A.C.S.O., 1950; immigr. offr., Uga., 1952; senr., 1962-64. (Uga. Govt. service.)

ALDOUS, L. W.—b. 1913; ed. Stationers' Co. Sch., and L.S.E., London Univ.; mil. serv., 1939-45, capt.; F.O. (German section) control comsnr. for Germany, 1946-49; devel. asst., Uga., 1952; asst. sec., 1954; senr. asst. sec., 1955; under sec., 1958; sec., E.A.C.S.O., 1960; princ. econ. offr.

ALDOUS, P. E.—b. 1918; ed. New Plymouth High Sch. and Victoria Univ. Coll., N.Z.; mil. serv., 1939-44 (N.Z.A.) capt.; cadet, N. Rhod., 1949; dist. offr., 1951; admin. offr., gr. II, 1962; asst. sec., 1964. (Zambia Govt. service.)

ALEXANDER, D. A. R., C.B.E. (1963).—b. 1920; ed. St. Mary's Coll., St. Lucia, and Univ. Coll., London; barrister-at-law, Middle Temple; dep. clk. of courts, J'ca, 1944; mag., Turks and Caicos Is., 1947; clk. of courts, J'ca, 1949; asst. legal dftsmn., 1951; legal dftsmn., 1955; W. Nig., 1957; solr.-gen. (W. Nig. Govt. service.)

ALEXANDER, D. R. W., M.B.E.(Mil.)—b. 1918; ed. Montrose Academy and Edin. Univ.; mil. serv., 1939-46, lt. col.; admin. cadet, Nig., 1946; resig. 1947; reappr. admin. offr., gr. III, Som., 1948; gr. II, 1948; secon. Cyrenaica, 1948-53; gr. I, chief sec., min. of interior, 1951; cadet offr. cl. II, H. K., 1953; ch. asst. soc. wel. and asst. sec. Chinese affrs. 1954; comsnr., E.S.C. and ch. staff offr. C.A.S., 1956; asst. D.U.S., 1958; admin. offr., staff gr. C, 1959; chmn. U.C., 1960; mem. leg. co., 1960; asst. dir. soc. welf., 1962; dep. comsnr. labr. and mines, 1963-64.

ALEXANDER, J.—b. 1909; ed. Aberdeen Gram. Sch. and Aberdeen Univ.; mil. serv., 1939-45, W.S./capt., R.E.; engr., H. K., 1949; asst. chief engr., 1957; chief engr., 1958; asst. D.P.W., 1961; govt. civil engr., 1964.

ALEXANDER, J. B., C.B.E.—b. 1912; ed. Tiffin Boys' Sch., Kingston-on-Thames, Imp. Coll. of Science and Tech., London Univ. and California Inst. of Tech., U.S.A.; interned, 1942-45; geologist, Nyasa, 1935; F.M.S., 1939; prin. geol., Fed. of Mal., 1950; dep. dir., geol. survey, 1957; dir., geol. survey.
ALEXIS, F. C.—b. 1913; ed. Grenada Boys' Secondary Sch. and Royal Coll. of Surgeons, Edin.; dist. med. offr., St. V., 1935; supt. physician, col. hosp., Grenada, 1952; S.M.O., 1955.

ALLAN, A. J., Q.P.M. (1963), C.P.M. (1954).—b. 1920; ed. Boroughmuir High Sch., Edin.; mil. serv., 1939-42; asst. insp., police, Ken., 1942; asst. supt., 1948; supt., 1952; senr. supt., 1954; asst. comsnr., 1960. (Ken. Govt. service.)

ALLAN, A. S., M.B.E.(Mil.) (1943)—b. 1914; ed. Stonyhurst and Univ. of Rennes, France; mil. serv., 1939-46, major; cadet, Tang., 1950; dist. offr., 1952; asst. sec., Ken., 1953; dist. offr., Tang., 1955; estab. offr., 1955; prin. asst. sec., 1959-61; dep. ch. sec. Maur., 1962.

ALLAN, C. H., O.B.E. (1959)—b. 1921; ed. Hamilton High Sch., Canterbury Univ. Coll., N.Z., and Camb. Univ.; mil. serv., 1942-44; cadet, B.S.I.P., 1945; admin. offr., cl. B., 1949; secon. spec. lands comsnr., 1954; cl. A., 1955; senr. asst. sec., W. Pac. H.C., 1957; secon. N. Hebs., 1958.

ALLAN, D. A. G., M.C.—b. 1918; ed. Geo. Watson's Coll., Edin., and Edin. Univ.; mil. serv., 1939-47, major; exec. engr., Ken., 1948; senr. exec. engr., Nyasa., 1956; ch. plannng. engr., 1962. (Malawi Govt. service.)

ALLAN, J. A.—b. 1910; ed. Glasgow Univ. and W. of Scotland Agric. Coll.; lectr., Barb., 1936; tech. offr., Nat. Inst. of Agric. Botany, Camb., 1944; supt., agric., Cyprus, 1945; pasture research offr., Ken., 1947; agric. offr., N. Rhod., 1949-64. (Zambia Govt. service.)

ALLAN, J.A.B., C.M.G. (1965).—b. 1911; ed. Douai Sch.; mil. serv., 1940-48 (desps.), lt.-col.; supt., prisons, Mal., 1948; senr. supt., Uga., 1956; dep. comsnr., prisons, 1958; comsnr. prisons, Ken., 1961-64; ret., apptd. advsr., prison services, Ken., 1964. (Ken. Govt. service.)
ALLAN, T. G.—b. 1927; ed. Moray Hse., Royal High and Borough Muir Schs. Edin., Edin. Univ.; mil. serv. 1945-48; assr. consvr. forests, Fiji, 1951; N. Rhod. 1958. (Zambia Govt. service.)
ALLAN, W. G. L.—b. 1923; ed. Trinity Coll., Glenalmond, and Aberdeen Univ.; M.O. Tang., 1951; M.O. Hong Kong, 1954; snr. med. and health offr., 1959; prin. M. & H.O., 1963.
ALLEN, M. D.—b. 1929; ed. Abbotsholme Sch., Derbyshire and St. Andrews Univ.; mil. serv., 1947-49, 13th/18th Hussars; cadet, Aden, 1954; admin. offr., cl. B, N. Heb. 1958; B.S.I.P., 1963.

ALLEN, R. L.—b. 1914; ed. Coombe Down C. of E. Sch. and Bath Tech. Coll.; Br. P.O. 1942-47; Sudan govt. posts and tels. dept., 1945; E.A. posts and tels. dept., techn., gr. I, 1947; Insptg. techn., 1949; supv.g. techn., 1954; senr. asst. engr., 1955; senr. sect. engr., 1962; dist. engr., 1962-64.
ALLEN, S. J. H.—b. 1927; ed. Ardingly Coll.; Pal. police, 1946-48; survr., D.O.S., 1949; staff survr., S. Leone, 1956; asst. dir., survey, 1960. (S.L. Govt. service.)
ALLEYNE, C. G.—b. 1923; ed. Combermere Sch., Barb.; clk. 1942; inspr. of income tax, 1945; stats. clk. 1955; stats. asst., 1956; asst. govt. stat., 1961; govt. stat., 1964.
ALLINSON, W. C.—b. 1920; ed. Bede Collegiate Boys Sch., Sunderland; port offr., E.A.R. & H., 1951; pilot, 1952-64.

ALLISON, J. A., O.B.E.—b. 1915; ed. St. John's Coll., Jo'burg, and Witwatersrand Univ.; mil. serv., 1940-46, major; admin. offr., cl. IV, Nig., 1938; D.O., 1946; Bech. Prot., 1950; high comsnr's. office, 1950-51; senr. D.O., fin. sec., 1958; admin. sec., 1962; perm. sec., min. home affrs., 1965.

ALLSEBROOK, G. P.—b. 1918; ed. Stowe Sch., Kent Sch., Conn., U.S.A. and Trinity Coll., Oxford; barrister-at-law, Middle Temple; mil. serv., 1939-43, capt.; cadet, Tang., 1940; D.O., 1942; admin. offr., cl. IIIB, 1958; secon., admnr., Virgin Is., 1956-59; dep. prov. comsnr. Tang., 1960; admin. offr., cl. II A, 1961; admin. sec., 1962. (Tanzania Govt. service.)

ALLWRIGHT, W. C.—b. 1915; ed. Rutlish Sch., Merton, and King's Coll. Hosp., Univ. of London; mil. serv., 1940-46, sqdn. Idr.; dental surg., H.K., 1947; senr., 1949; redcsig. dental specialist, 1951; senr. dental spec., 1959; H. k. rep. at W.H.O. dental health seminar, N.Z., 1954.
ALMAN, J. H.—b. 1919; ed. Chester Coll., Birkenhead, and L'pool Univ.; mil. serv., 1939-46, major (desps.); educ. offr., Mal., 1946; prin., Kent teachers train. coll., N. Borneo, 1953-64.
ALP, W. C.—b. 1907; ed. Christ's Hosp. and London Univ.; mil. serv., 1940-45; archt., P.W.D., Ken., 1948. (Ken. Govt. service.)
ALTORFER, A.—b. 1915; ed. Calday Grange Gram. Sch.; mil. serv. 1940-46; prin. local govt. inspr., Ken., 1950; dep. sec., min. local govt., 1962-64. (Ken. Govt. service.)
ALVES, J. V.—b. 1915; ed. St. Vincent Gram. Sch.; clk. 1938; sec. control dept., 1944; inc. tax inspr., 1951; publ. rel. and loc. govt. offr., 1956; princ. sec. chief min. off., 1960.

AMBROSE, H. B.—b. 1924; ed. Aldenham Sch., Wye Coll., London Univ., and Christ's Coll., Camb.; mil. serv., 1942-46, R.M.; agric. offr. (exper.), Ken., 1950; agric. research offr., Nyasa., 1957. (Malawi Govt. service.)
AMBROSE, J.—b. 1914; ed. Wade Deacon Gram Sch., Widnes; mil. serv., 1935-45, sgt. (desps.); chargeman mech., Tang., 1950; inspr. mechl., 1952; ch. inspr. mechl., 1963. (Tanzania Govt. service.)

AMBROSE, J. W. D.—b. 1909; ed. Free Sch., Penang and Keble Coll., Oxford; barrister-at-law, Inner Temple; asst. offr., assignee, S'pore, 1936; police mag. and asst. dist. judge, Malacca, 1940; regist., superior ct., 1945; dep. publ. prosecutor, N. Sembilan, 1946; senr. asst. regist., supreme cts. of Ipoh, Penang, K. Lumpur, 1947-52; pres., sessions ct., Penang, 1953; ag. dist. judge and 1st mag., S'pore, 1955; off. assignee, public trustee, comsnr. of estate duties, etc., 1957; puisne judge, 1958.

AMES, C. G.—b. 1897; ed. Dover Coll.; admin. offr., 1922; asst. judge, Nig. Prot., 1934; judge, 1945; ret. 1950; re-apptd. temp. judge, Gamb.; just. of appeal, W. Afr. ct. of appeal; comsnr. rev. of laws; pres. S.L. and Gamb., ct. of appeal, 1962.
AMPUTCH, J., M.B.E. (1959)—b. 1911; labr. inspr., Fiji, 1944; labr. offr., 1950; senr., 1957; comsnr., labr., 1960.

ANDERSEN, V. J., O.B.E. (1960), M.B.E. (1955), V.R.D. (1962).—b. 1919; ed. Napier and Auckland Univ. Coll., N.Z.; mil. serv., 1940-46; cadet, B.S.I.P., 1943; admin. offr., cl. B, 1950; cl. A, 1954; senr. asst. sec. (native affrs.), W. Pac. H.C., 1955; sec., prot. affrs., 1958; resdt. cmnsr., G.E.I.C., 1962.

ANDERSON, A. H., M.B.E. (1957).—b. 1901; ed. privately; p.s. to gov., B. Hond., 1927; asst. contrlr., food and prices, 1939; contrlr., 1940; dist. comsnr., 1942; asst. sec. and archaeol. comsnr., 1953; archaeol. comsnr. (full-time), 1957.
ANDERSON, A. M.—b. 1924; ed. Dollar Acad., and St. Andrew's Univ.; mil. serv., 1943-46, capt.; fisheries offr., N. Borneo, 1949; Uga., 1953; senr., 1958. (Uga. Govt. service.)

ANDERSON, C. P.—b. 1922; ed. Trinity Acad., Edin., and Heriot Watt Coll.; mil. serv., 1939-53, techn., gr. I, E.A.P.& T.; admin. 1953; asst. engrn. gr. II, 1955; gr. I, 1957; senr. asst. engrn., 1962.
ANDERSON, E. A.—b. 1908; ed. Diocesan High Sch., Belize, and Toronto Univ.; apprentice surveyor, B. Hond., 1929; gov't. surveyor, 1932; senr. surveyor, 1953.

ANDERSON, G. W.—b. 1914; ed. Geo. Watson's Coll., Edin. Univ. and I.C.T.A.; mil. serv., 1940-41; agric. offr., Ken., 1938; Zanz., 1948; Uga., 1953; senr. agric. offr., 1955; asst. dir., agric. (field) 1959; dep. dir. 1960. (Uga. Govt. service.)
ANDERSON, J. A. R., M.C. and bar.—b. 1922; ed. Durham Sch., and Edin. Univ.; mil. serv., 1940–46; asst. consvr. forests, S'wak, 1951.

ANDERSON, J. D., M.C.—b. 1922; ed. Marlborough Coll., and Univ. Coll., Oxford; mil. serv., 1942–45, capt.; apptd. col. serv., 1947; home civil serv., asst. prin., C.O., 1948; prtn., 1952; secon., N. Nig., 1955–56; p.s. to Sec. D.T.C., 1961; asst. sec., 1964; trans., O.D.M., 1964.
ANDERSON, K. L. C.—b. 1929; ed., Tonbridge Sch.; staff surveyor, Uga., 1951. (Uga. Govt. service.)

ANDERSON, R. G.—b. 1926; ed. Haileybury, Imp. Service Coll. and Oriel Coll. Oxford; mil. serv., 1944–48, R.N.V.R. lieut. (special); admin. cadet, Nig., 1950; p.s. to Gov. E. Nig., 1952; admin. offr., cl. III, 1953; asst. dist. comsnr., Uga., 1958; dist. comsnr., 1960; asst. sec. min. agric. and co-ops., 1962; prin. asst. sec., 1964. (Uga. Govt. service.)

ANDERSON, Lieut.-Col. S. A., M.B.E. (1961), C.P.M.—b. 1916; ed. Jamaica, Metrop. Police Training Course, London, and Fingerprint Course and Criminal Record Office Course, New Scotland Yard; mil. serv., 1939–45; J'ca constab., 1936; col. police serv., J'ca, 1951; supt., police, St. V., 1954; redesig. ch. of police, 1962.
ANDERSON, V. H. J., C.P.M. (1961)—asst. supt. police, Nig., 1950; supt., Gam., 1957; asst. comsnr., 1963–64.
